title: Compare the unit sizes
text: $$1$$ $$lbf=4.45$$ N, meaning a newton is a smaller unit than a pound-force. If you output a number in lbf and someone reads it as newtons, is that number bigger or smaller than the true newton value?

title: Concrete example
text: A force of $$1$$ $$lbf=4.45$$ N. If $$SM_{FORCES}$$ outputs "1" (in lbf) but the reader thinks it's newtons, they believe the force is $$1$$ N - but the true value is $$4.45$$ N. So the output was too small by a factor of $$4.45$$.
